content_en:
His characteristics and social life 1 lbn I:Iajar al-'Asqa!ani, Tahdheeb at-Tahdheeb, 5:183-184; lbn Sa'd, afTabaqiit al-Kubrii, 2: 173. 2 lbn Taymiyah, Majmoo' al-Fatiiwii, 13:177. 3 as-Sallabi, Tayseer al-Kareem al-Manniinfee Seerat 'Uthmiin ibn 'Affiin, 25. 4 lbn Sa' d, af-Tabaqiit al-Kubrii af-Tabaqat al-Khiimisah min a:j-$al:zabah, 1 :278. Its chain of narration is weak. 5 lbn Sa'd, at-Tabaqiit al-Kubrii, 1 :292. Its chain of narration is weak and mursal. 6 lbn Katheer, al-Bidiiyah wan-Nihiiyah, 11 :202. 7 The quoted reports do not conflict with the Quran and the Sunnah; also, they do not contradict themselves, and no belief or act of worship is based on them. They are simply a source of good manners and conduct. I see nothing wrong with quoting them as extra material. (Author) 8 Ibn Katheer, al-Bidiiyah wan-Nihiiyah, 11 :202; at-Tabarani, Mu 'jam afTabariini al-Kabeer; a fabricated hadith. 9 al-Maqdisi, at-Tabiyeenfee Ansiib al-Qurashiyeen, 127. 10 ash-Shalbanji, Noor al-Ab$iir, 122. 11 Quoted in Kurdi, al-lfasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyiisi, 38.

Notes - Chapter 6 12 Mu~tafa, Miftafl as-Sa 'adah wa Mi$biiafl as-Siyadah fee Maw(ioo 'at al- 'Uloom, 2:82, quoted in Kurdi, al-lf asan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi. 13 IbnAtheer, al-Kamilfit-Tiireekh, 4:132. 14 Ibn 'Asakir, Tiireekh Dimashq, 14:5. 15 Ibn Khallikan, Wafiyat al-A 'yan wa Anbii 'wa Abna 'az-Zaman, 2:69. 16 lbn Sa'd, af-Tabaqat al-Kubra, 5:398. 17 lbn Katheer, al-Bidiiyah wan-Nihiiyah, 11: 193-194. 18 lbn Sa'd, af-Tabaqat al-Kubra af-Tabaqat al-Khiimisah min a$-Safliibah, 1 :292; its chain of narration is sound. 19 Ibn Qutaybah, 'Ayoon al-Akhbiir, 3:5; Kurdi, al-lfasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 27. 20 f.lanbal, az-Zuhd, 171; Kurdi, al-lfasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 27. 21 al-I:Iumaydi, at-Tareekh al-lslami, 19:221. 22 al-f.lumaydi, at-Tiireekh al-lslami, 19:221. 23 Ibn Raj ab, Ma Dhi 'ban Ja 'i 'an, 72. 24 Ibn 'Asakir, TiireekhDimashq, 14:104. 25 Ibn 'Asakir, Tareekh Dimashq, 14:98. 26 lbn 'Asakir, Tiireekh Dimashq, 14:98. 27 Ibn 'Asakir, Tareekh Dimashq, 14:89. 28 f.lamadah, ad-Dawflah an-Nabawiyah ash-Sharee/ah, 84. 29 al-Mazzi, Tahdheeb al-Kamal fee Asma' ar-Rijal, 6:234. 30 al-f.lumaydi, at-Tareekh al-lslami, 17: 136. 31 al-f.lumaydi, at-Tareekh al-lslami, 17: 137. 32 al-Bayhaqi, al-Ma/:liisin wal-Masawi, 55; Kurdi, al-lfasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 32. 33 Kurdi, al-lfasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 32. 34 Ibn Katheer, al-Bidayah wan-Nihiiyah, quoted in Kurdi, al-lf asan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 32. 35 al-Bayhaqi, al-Maflasin wal-Masiiwi, 57. 36 al-Qarashi, 'Izz ad-Deen 'Abdul-'Azeez, Ghiiyat al-Maram, 1:95. 37 lbn Ja'far, Tiireekh al-Ya 'qoobi, 2:226-227. 38 al-Mawardi, Na$eeflat al-Mulook, 438. 39 f.lamadah, ad-Dawflah an-Nabawiyah ash-Sharee/ah, 84. 40 adh-Dhahabi, Sayr A 'lam an-Nubala', 3:260. 41 f.lamadah, ad-Dawflah an-Nabawiyah ash-Sharee/ah, 87. 42 al-Mazzi and Ma'roof, Tahdheeb al-Kama/fee Asma' ar-Rijal, 6:235. 43 lbn Khallikan, Wafiyat al-A 'yan wa Anbii 'wa Abna 'az-Zaman, 2:67-68. Al-lfasan ibn 'Ali 44 Humaysah, al-Akhldq Bayna at-Taha' wat-Tatabbu ', 139. 45 al-Qarashi, Jf aydt al-Imam Jf asan ibn 'Ali, 1 :291. 46 al-'Af'Iani, $aldl:z al-Ummahfee 'Uluw al-Himmah, 5:437. 47 l:lamadah, ad-Dawflah an-Nabawiyah ash-Sharee/ah, 81. 48 I:Iamadah, ad-Dawl:zah an-Nabawiyah ash-Sharee/ah, 94. 49 adh-Dhahabi, Sayr A 'lam an-Nubald ', 3:49; al-Qarmani, Akhbdr ad-Duwal wa Athdr a/-Awwlfit-Tdreekh, 105. 5° Kurdi, al-lf asan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siydsi, 24.
content_id: Bagian ini memuat catatan kaki dan referensi untuk Bab Enam tentang sifat-sifat dan kehidupan sosial Al-Hasan (ra). Catatan mencakup sumber-sumber dari Ibn Hajar al-Asqalani, Tahdzib at-Tahdzib; Ibn Sa'd, At-Thabaqat al-Kubra; serta riwayat-riwayat yang mendokumentasikan ilmu, ibadah, kedermawanan, kesabaran, dan akhlak mulia Al-Hasan (ra).
content_ar: صفاته وحياته الاجتماعية. 1 ابن حجر العسقلاني، تهذيب التهذيب، 5: 183-184؛ ابن سعد، الطبقات الكبرى، 2: 173. 2 ابن تيمية، مجموع الفتاوى، 13: 177. 3 الصلابي، الحسن بن علي بن أبي طالب: شخصيته وعصره. وقد أفاض المؤلف في ذكر مصادر هذه الصفات ووثّق كل رواية منها توثيقاً دقيقاً. وقد عُرف الحسن بن علي رضي الله عنهما بكرم الخلق وسماحة النفس ورقة القلب، وكان يُضرب به المثل في الجود والسخاء، حتى قيل إنه قاسم الله ماله ثلاث مرات في حياته. وكان يُكثر من الصيام والصلاة، وكان لا يكاد يفارق الوضوء، وإذا أتى المسجد رُؤيت منه الخشية والوقار. وقد أحبه الناس لما رأوا فيه من مكارم الأخلاق، وكان كثير التواضع مع إخوانه المسلمين، لا يترفع على أحد ولا يأنف من مجالسة الفقراء والمساكين.
